title: rubus chloranthus
intro: Rubus chloranthus, also known as the Chinese raspberry or Five-flower raspberry, is a type of flowering plant in the rose family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus chloranthus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
